intro: A mysterious letter arrived on your doorstep this morning!
It must be delivered to Clover the Bunny on Sunny Hill.
Will you carry it through the Whispering Forest?

entry: The trees are full of secrets...
Look around — some friends might need your help before we go on!
butterflyIntro: Oh no! A butterfly is tangled in the vines!
To free her, you must solve 3 puzzles, [NAME]!
Good luck — the clock is ticking!
butterflyWrong_hard: Oops! Pulling too hard might hurt her little wings.
butterflyWrong_away: Let's go back and help her.
butterflySuccess: You freed her so gently! The butterfly flutters free!
She dances around you to say thank you!
acornsIntro: Oh dear! Sammy the Squirrel dropped all her acorns!
Can you solve 3 puzzles to help her find them, [NAME]?
Show Sammy how clever you are!
acornsSuccess: You found all 6 acorns! Sammy does a happy little dance!
She says you have the sharpest eyes in the whole forest!

arrival: We made it to Sunny Hill, [NAME]!
There's Clover, waiting in the sunshine!
delivery: A letter? For me? Oh how wonderful!
Oh, [NAME]... it's a drawing of us together!
This is the most beautiful thing I have ever seen.
Thank you so much for bringing it all this way!
celebration: You did it, [NAME]! What an amazing adventure!
You are the kindest, bravest friend in the whole world!

bedroomMorning: [NAME]! It's me, Bea! Wake up — you have a wobbly tooth!
This is very special! The Tooth Fairy's Lake is nearby...
Legend says she has hidden 6 magical trial stones around the lake!
The first brave child to collect all 6 gets a visit from the Tooth Fairy tonight!
Are you ready for the adventure, [NAME]?
villagePath: The Tooth Fairy's Lake is just ahead, [NAME]!
6 stones, 6 challenges — kindness and bravery will see you through.
I'll be waiting for you at the end. Now go find those stones!
lakeshoreArrival: Welcome to the Tooth Fairy's Lake, [NAME]! Isn't it beautiful?
The first trial stone is over by the lily pads!
But the lily pads need your help first...
lilyPadsIntro: Oh no! The lily pads have all floated apart!
Help them reunite by solving 3 challenges, [NAME]!
lilyPadsSuccess: The lily pads are together again! The first trial stone is YOURS!
lakeShallowsArrival: Look at the shallows, [NAME] — the baby fish are playing!
Trial stone 2 is hidden with them. And stone 3 is... in the tooth waterfall!
That one will take real skill!
babyFishIntro: The baby fish are all muddled up! Can you help them, [NAME]?
Solve 3 challenges and they'll show you where the stone is hiding!
babyFishSuccess: The baby fish are so happy! Stone number 2 is yours, [NAME]!
fallingTeethIntro: The magical tooth waterfall! Stone 3 is hidden inside!
Catch all 20 falling teeth as they come down, [NAME]!
But be careful — 3 misses and you start again!
fallingTeethSuccess: Stone 3 is yours! That's halfway — 3 of 6!
deepLakeArrival: The deep lake... this is where the Lake Spirit lives, [NAME].
Stones 4, 5 and 6 are all here. This will be your greatest challenge yet.
Brave heart, [NAME]. You can do this!
fairyRingIntro: The Fairy Ring! It glows with ancient magic...
Stones 4 and 5 are here, [NAME]. Prove your wisdom!
fairyRingSuccess: Brilliantly done! Stones 4 and 5 are yours, [NAME]!
Now for the last stone — but first, face the Lake Spirit!
lakeSpiritIntro: HALT. Who dares enter my domain?
You want the 6th stone? Then MATCH MY PATTERN, child!
Watch carefully, [NAME]... then repeat exactly what you see!
lakeSpiritWrong: Take your time, [NAME]. You can do it!
lakeSpiritSuccess: ...Remarkable. You have a brave and clever heart.
Take the 6th stone, [NAME]. You have earned it truly.
Now go home — and keep that tooth safe tonight!
bedroomNight: You collected all 6 trial stones, [NAME]! You did it!
And look... your tooth is ready to come out!
Put it under your pillow, close your eyes, and go to sleep...
The Tooth Fairy WILL come tonight. I promise.
toothFairyArrival: I heard about your incredible bravery at my lake today!
You collected all 6 stones and faced my Lake Spirit!
Here is a very special gift — just for you. Sweet dreams! ✨
ch2Complete: Kind, brave, and brilliant at the Tooth Fairy's Lake.
